title: rosettea rhinanthifolia
intro: Rotea rhinanthifolia, also known as the yellow rattle, is a flowering plant species in the family Orobanchaceae. It is a hemiparasitic plant that obtains some of its nutrients by connecting to the roots of other plants, but it is also known to have medicinal properties. The plant contains compounds that have been traditionally used to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, and also have anti-inflammatory properties. Rotea rhinanthifolia can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infused in oil to be used topically, and is also used in traditional medicine to promote digestion and relieve stress.
